# NEXO Brain

> Cognitive co-operator for Claude Code. Atkinson-Shiffrin memory model with 111+ MCP tools, knowledge graph, web dashboard, and auto-compaction context continuity.

NEXO Brain is an MCP server that gives AI coding agents persistent, psychologically-grounded memory. It implements the Atkinson-Shiffrin memory model (Sensory Register, Short-Term Memory, Long-Term Memory) with vector embeddings, semantic RAG retrieval, automatic memory lifecycle management, and a bi-temporal knowledge graph.

## Key Features (v1.1.1)

- **Knowledge Graph**: Bi-temporal entity-relationship graph (988 nodes, 896 edges) with BFS traversal, temporal queries, D3 visualization, and event-sourced smart dedup
- **Web Dashboard**: 6 pages (Overview, Graph, Memory, Somatic, Adaptive, Sessions) at localhost:6174, built with FastAPI + D3.js
- **Cross-Platform**: Full Linux and Windows support with opportunistic maintenance
- **Cognitive Memory**: STM/LTM stores with Ebbinghaus decay, semantic consolidation, sibling detection, prediction error gating
- **Adaptive Personality**: 3 modes (FLOW/NORMAL/TENSION) driven by 6 weighted signals. Weights learn from real feedback via Ridge regression (shadow mode, momentum, auto-rollback)
- **Somatic Markers**: Pain memory per file/area. Files that cause repeated errors accumulate risk scores. Guard warns on HIGH RISK (>0.5) and CRITICAL (>0.8)
- **Trust Score**: Alignment index (0-100) that modulates guard rigor. Auto-adjusts on corrections, thanks, delegations
- **Guard System**: Pre-edit checks with learnings, blocking rules, cognitive semantic matches, somatic risk scores
- **Session Coordination**: Multi-terminal support with heartbeat, file tracking, inter-session messaging
- **Episodic Memory**: Change log, decisions with outcomes, session diaries with mental state continuity
- **Context Continuity**: PreCompact saves full session checkpoint; PostCompact re-injects Core Memory Block. Long sessions (8+ hours) feel like one continuous conversation
- **Full Orchestration**: 6 automated hooks, post-mortem with self-critique, auto-compaction context preservation, reflection engine
- **Storage Router**: Multi-tenant ready abstraction layer

## Installation

```bash
npx nexo-brain
```

- GitHub: https://github.com/wazionapps/nexo
